commit.message:
fix: fault-tolerant TZIP-21 metadata deserialization

Rewrite TokenMetadata.UnmarshalJSON to decode via map[string]json.RawMessage
so no single malformed field can crash the entire wallet sync. Every string
field is coerced through rawJSONToString, the formats array is decoded
entry-by-entry with malformed entries skipped, and non-object metadata
(string, array, number) is handled gracefully instead of returning an error.

This fixes sync failures caused by on-chain metadata with non-string types
in fields like mimeType, description, and name — which is valid on Tezos
since token metadata has no enforced schema.

Adds 10 new test cases covering format field resilience (array mimeType,
non-array formats, malformed entries, non-object metadata blobs) and 6
new fuzz seeds.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add Final Integration & Validation issue to engineering plan

PE agent now creates a T-FINAL engineering task issue that depends on all
other tasks. When all non-integration tasks are complete, the PE leader

any fixes, and closes the issue.

- Integration task is never assigned to regular engineers

- Issue is closed with a comment when integration completes (with or without fixes)

commit.message:
fix: redirect embedded static asset paths to root

Cached pages with old relative asset references cause browsers to
resolve _content/ and _framework/ paths against the page URL, producing
URLs like /movie/.../discs/_content/Foo/bar.js. These match greedy
Razor route templates and cause 404s with wasted DB queries.

The LowercaseUrlMiddleware now detects /_content/ and /_framework/
appearing at non-root positions and 301-redirects to the correct
root-relative path (e.g. /_content/Foo/bar.js).

Fix TTL entry merges to use max() instead of last-writer-wins

Add merge_ttl_current() helper to LedgerDelta that takes
max(live_until_ledger_seq) for TTL entries during Updated+Updated
coalescing, while preserving last-writer-wins for all other entry types.

This fixes two consensus-critical bugs:
- Cross-cluster: delta.merge() Updated+Updated for TTL keys now takes max
- Intra-cluster: record_update() Updated→Updated for TTL keys now takes max

Matches stellar-core's maybeMergeRoTTLBumps semantics. TTL key with
non-TTL data is treated as a hard error (invariant violation).

Includes 10 regression tests covering both orderings, non-TTL unchanged
behavior, Created+Updated not max-merged, and pipeline-level scenarios
for intra-cluster, cross-cluster, and RW-after-RO cases.

Closes #1512

still installing from the exact same commit (80e23c0).

fix: skip auth middleware for OAuth discovery paths (#186)

* fix: skip auth middleware for /.well-known/ OAuth discovery paths

MCP clients (including Copilot CLI) probe /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server
to detect OAuth. When the auth middleware returned 401 on this path, clients
incorrectly concluded OAuth was required and prompted for Client ID.

By skipping auth on /.well-known/ paths, these probes receive 404 from the
SSE app, signaling that simple Bearer token auth should be used instead.

feat(generator): uppercase aggregate and window function names (#31)

> [!NOTE]
> This PR was authored by GitHub Copilot CLI (powered by Claude Sonnet
4.6) on behalf of @johnallen3d.

## Summary

Implements uppercase aggregate and window function names as specified in
#28.

**Before:**
```sql
SELECT
   count(*)
  ,sum(amount)
  ,row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY ts)
  ,array_agg(DISTINCT sku ORDER BY sku)
FROM t
```

**After:**
```sql
SELECT
   COUNT(*)
  ,SUM(amount)
  ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY ts)
  ,ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT sku ORDER BY sku)
FROM t
```

Scalar functions remain lowercase: `regexp_extract`, `strftime`,
`read_parquet`, etc.

## Implementation

- `src/jarify/generator.py`: Added `_UPPERCASE_FUNCS:
ClassVar[frozenset[str]]` derived from sqlglot's `AggFunc` subclass
hierarchy plus `RowNumber`. A supplemental set covers DuckDB dialect
renames (`var_pop`, `quantile_cont`, `listagg`, `bool_or`, etc.).
`normalize_func` override checks this set and uppercases/lowercases
accordingly. `arrayagg_sql` hardcoded `"array_agg"` in two places —
replaced with `self.normalize_func("ARRAY_AGG")`.
- `tests/fixtures/duckdb/agg_window_uppercase.{input,expected}.sql`: New
fixture pair covering the full range of aggregate and window functions.
- Updated 4 existing fixture snapshots.
- `docs/sql-style-guide.md`: Renamed "Functions — lowercase" section to
"aggregate and window uppercase, scalar lowercase" with updated
examples. Fixed `count`, `row_number`, `array_agg` references
throughout.

Resolves #28

fix: guide drag offset + inspector hover detection

Guides:
- Record cursor-to-guide offset on MouseDown so guide doesn't jump to
  cursor position when clicked. Applies to both guide strip and handle.
- f._dragOffset = cursorPx - data.px at drag start; subtracted in OnUpdate.

Inspector:
- Remove hide/show intercept trick from GetFocusedFrame().
  GetMouseFoci() in WoW 12.0.1 returns all frames under cursor across all
  strata, not just the topmost. The intercept is already in SKIP_NAMES so
  it gets filtered out naturally — no need to hide/show it.

  which is why hover was silently returning nil.

Forms: Fix form block not working when Blocks module is inactive (#48037)

* Forms: Fix form block not working when Blocks module is inactive

The Form block was unusable when the contact-form module was active but
the blocks module was not. Three barriers prevented it from working:

1. The parent jetpack/contact-form block was only registered via the
   Blocks module's extension loader. Now registered directly from the
   Forms package in Contact_Form_Plugin::register_contact_form_blocks().

2. The editor JS depended on jetpack-blocks-editor, a script only
   registered by the Blocks module. Without it, WordPress silently
   skipped loading the Forms editor bundle entirely.

3. The JS availability check (Jetpack_Editor_Initial_State) and module
   status check (useModuleStatus) both defaulted to "unavailable" when
   the Blocks module didn't provide the initial state, showing an
   "Activate Forms" placeholder instead of the actual block.

The fix registers a minimal jetpack-blocks-editor script with the
required initial state (available_blocks, modules, feature_flags) when
the Blocks module is inactive, allowing Forms to work independently.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
